subject: Fix CLM job for NexusIQ scan
commit_message:
Fix CLM job for NexusIQ scan

Deploying common-app-api so it can be found in Nexus

Change-Id: I71401f70fa9c027be3a27be8ff253716961805d4
Issue-ID: SDC-2737
Signed-off-by: Ofir Sonsino <os0695@intl.att.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/sdc-master-verify-java/5403/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/sdc-master-verify-java/5403
Change has been successfully rebased and submitted as abc10d923a2520e7233f3681a8c5811516908891 by Yuli Shlosberg

Patch Set 1:

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/sdc-onboarding-maven-clm-master/26/ : FAILURE (skipped)

Build failed to find artifact org.openecomp.sdc:common-app-api:jar:1.6.0-SNAPSHOT needed for sub-project org.openecomp.sdc.core:openecomp-utilities-lib:jar:1.6.0-SNAPSHOT. Check correct groupId, artifactId and version. This may also indicate a problem with nexus. Another possibility is that this is a -SNAPSHOT version and it has expired from nexus -- in that case check with the project which provides the artifact. ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/sdc-onboarding-maven-clm-master/26/ )
